title: QA Hardening — Security, Mission IDs, Error UX
description: Fix P0/P1 findings from agentic PRD 110-117 quality review.

userStories.title: SSRF guard on watchlist careers_url
userStories.description: Reject private/link-local/metadata IPs at validation. httpx follow_redirects=False or re-validate redirect host. Tests for blocked URLs.

userStories.title: get_verified_user on brief endpoints
userStories.description: brief_router.py all routes use get_verified_user not get_current_user.

userStories.title: Stable mission IDs from application IDs
userStories.description: mission_scorer uses stable id from action_url app id or item metadata not section:index. Update snooze/done to match.

userStories.title: Atomic mock interview daily quota
userStories.description: find_one_and_update with $lt limit check. User local date not UTC.

userStories.title: Error states for AgentActivity and EmailTimeline
userStories.description: Show destructive error message on isError, not empty/null lie.

userStories.title: Follow-up draft Gemini path parity
userStories.description: Extract follow-up generation to service.py. Gemini path gets cache, quota, agent_log like OpenRouter.
